/usr/bin/ar qc libeboot_core.a CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/bootctl.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/image_verify.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/slot_manager.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/boot_policy.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/recovery.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/fw_services.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/fw_update.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/fw_transport_uart.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/rtos_boot.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/rtos_params.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/boot_menu.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/device_table.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/runtime_services.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/crypto_boot.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/multicore.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/board_config.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/dram_init.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/pci_enum.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/storage.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/power_init.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/clock_init.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/mpu_boot.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/ecc_scrub.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/bmc_handoff.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/os_adapter.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/ed25519_verify.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/keystore.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/debug_lock.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/fw_decrypt.c.o CMakeFiles/eboot_core.dir/core/image_tlv.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libeboot_core.a
